reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the prescribing practitioner to weigh Hunter Williams's 2026-03-29 library-video position that "the mantra should be replacement, not enhancement" (hgh-for-longevity-what-the-human-studies-show--58329b61 @ 25:20, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/hgh-for-longevity-what-the-human-studies-show--58329b61/) against the competing expert view below. Hunter also says, "The high benefit is going to be for GH deficient and elderly. The low benefit, is gonna be, for athletes and healthy adults" (hgh-for-longevity-what-the-human-studies-show--58329b61 @ 24:47, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/hgh-for-longevity-what-the-human-studies-show--58329b61/).
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Hunter Williams (2026-03-29), "HGH for Longevity What the Human Studies Show": "30 to 40% of the patients in these trials had joint pain and swelling" (hgh-for-longevity-what-the-human-studies-show--58329b61 @ 6:55, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/hgh-for-longevity-what-the-human-studies-show--58329b61/).
- Hunter Williams (2026-03-29), "HGH for Longevity What the Human Studies Show": "18 percent, there was what you would call a trend towards insulin resistance" (hgh-for-longevity-what-the-human-studies-show--58329b61 @ 7:32, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/hgh-for-longevity-what-the-human-studies-show--58329b61/).
- Hunter Williams (2026-03-29), "HGH for Longevity What the Human Studies Show": "HEH, is contraindicated in acutely ill patients due to increased mortality in the 1999 study" (hgh-for-longevity-what-the-human-studies-show--58329b61 @ 16:28, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/hgh-for-longevity-what-the-human-studies-show--58329b61/).
- Hunter Williams (2026-03-29), "Does HGH Use Permanently Shut Down Your Pituitary Gland": "the theory suggests that prolonged use of exogenous growth hormones could lead to significant suppression of the pittuitory gland's natural HGH production" (does-hgh-use-permanently-shut-down-your-pituitary-gland--b19e12dc @ 6:44, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/does-hgh-use-permanently-shut-down-your-pituitary-gland--b19e12dc/).
- Dr Trevor Bachmeyer (2026-04-03), "The Endogenous GH Protocol Every Biohacker Needs to Know": "Exogenous HGH suppresses endogenous internally created GH secretion by 89% in 4 weeks. Pituitary responsiveness to GHRH decreases by 52%." (8bL5e8pQc_U @ 00:15:54.000, https://youtu.be/8bL5e8pQc_U).
